googleAwaitingApproval: Your Google sign-in worked - your access request is now awaiting an administrator's approval.
googleAccountDisabled: Your account has been disabled. Contact an administrator.
googleSignInFailed: Google sign-in failed. Please try again.
desktopSignInNetwork: Couldn't reach the server to finish signing in. Check your connection and try again.
desktopSignInExpired: Sign-in was interrupted. Please sign in again.
desktopSignInRejected: Google sign-in didn't complete. Please try again.
requestSubmitted: Thanks - if that email is eligible, an administrator will review your request and email you a setup link.
invalidLink: This setup link is invalid or has expired. Please request access again.
passwordRequirements: At least 8 characters with an uppercase letter, a lowercase letter, a number, and a symbol.
